products.name: Paper Bags — Kraft
products.description: Sturdy kraft paper bags suited for retail, grocery and general carry-bag use. Custom sizes and printing available.

products.name: Paper Bags — Recycled
products.description: Made from recycled paper stock for businesses that want a lower environmental footprint without compromising strength.

products.name: Paper Bags — Virgin
products.description: Premium virgin paper bags for a cleaner, brighter finish — ideal when print clarity and presentation matter most.

products.name: Paper Covers
products.description: Paper covers for packing and wrapping needs, available in a range of sizes with custom printing on request.

products.name: Paper Cups
products.description: Paper cups for beverages and food service, available in multiple sizes with optional custom branding.

products.name: Paper Tissues
products.variant: Semi Soft · Soft · Virgin Cellulose Fibre
products.description: Paper tissues across semi soft, soft and virgin cellulose fibre grades, suited for HORECA, retail and institutional use.
